emails.subject: Re: Friday ReCap
emails.body: Re: Friday ReCap Looks good. I wouldn't stress the MOU, but would rather focus on the "melding" of alot of good ideas. The Investigation concession comes from whom? Jim From: Jeff Dasovich on 05/07/2001 09:22 AM Sent by: Jeff Dasovich

emails.subject: Re: Friday ReCap
emails.body: Re: Friday ReCap Looks good. I wouldn't stress the MOU, but would rather focus on the "melding" of alot of good ideas. The Investigation concession comes from whom? Jim From: Jeff Dasovich on 05/07/2001 09:22 AM Sent by: Jeff Dasovich

emails.subject: Re: Friday ReCap
emails.body: Agreed. Great idea on characterizing it as a "melding." Need to fill you in on the "investigation" discussions with the Republicans in today's meeting with Lay. You still around? Best, Jeff James D Steffes 05/07/2001 11:58 AM

emails.subject: Re: Friday ReCap
